'''thashuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reablation|reablation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reablation|reablation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thashuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæshirith|thæshirith]] || [[word:thæshirij|thæshirij]] || [[word:thæshirish|thæshirish]] || [[word:thæshiri|thæshiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thashushuruth|thashushuruth]] || [[word:thashushuruj|thashushuruj]] || [[word:thashushurush|thashushurush]] || [[word:thashushuru|thashushuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashuruth|thashuruth]] || [[word:thashuruj|thashuruj]] || [[word:thashurush|thashurush]] || [[word:thashuru|thashuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashufruth|thashufruth]] || [[word:thashufruj|thashufruj]] || [[word:thashufrush|thashufrush]] || [[word:thashufruf|thashufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thashuruthu|thashuruthu]] || [[word:thashuruju|thashuruju]] || [[word:thashurushu|thashurushu]] || [[word:thashuruku|thashuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thashuruth|thashuruth]] || [[word:thashuruj|thashuruj]] || [[word:thashurush|thashurush]] || [[word:thashuru|thashuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thashuruthul|thashuruthul]] || [[word:thashurujul|thashurujul]] || [[word:thashurushul|thashurushul]] || [[word:thashurukul|thashurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thashuruthuthu|thashuruthuthu]] || [[word:thashurujuju|thashurujuju]] || [[word:thashurushushu|thashurushushu]] || [[word:thashuruku|thashuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thashuruthun|thashuruthun]] || [[word:thashurujun|thashurujun]] || [[word:thashurushun|thashurushun]] || [[word:thashurukun|thashurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thashuruthuoro|thashuruthuoro]] || [[word:thashurujuoro|thashurujuoro]] || [[word:thashurushuoro|thashurushuoro]] || [[word:thashurukuoro|thashurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
